notes.text: BB is only profitable strategy: 57% WR, +0.15%/trade. All others negative EV.
BB solo signals = 67.6% WR. Strongest pattern. Trust BB alone over consensus.
BB+MTQ combo = 35% WR. Contra-indicator. SKIP when both agree.
High confidence is NOT predictive. 80%+ WR is WORSE than <60%. Ignore confidence scores.
After 2 consecutive wins: 74-77% WR. After 2 losses: 28-29% WR. Streak momentum is real.
ETH_SELL_BB = 70% WR. Best golden setup. Prioritize ETH shorts on BB signals.
BTC_BUY_BB = 69% WR. Second best setup. Prioritize BTC longs on BB signals.
SOL_BUY_BB = 67% WR. Reliable long setup on BB signals.
BTC_SELL_BB = 61% WR. Decent but weaker than BTC longs. Size down on BTC shorts.
HYPE_SELL_BB = 35% WR. Worst BB setup. AVOID shorting HYPE on BB signals.
HYPE_BUY_CS = 38% WR. Dead setup. SKIP all CS-only HYPE longs.
high_volatility regime = 55% WR. Best regime for trading. Increase size in high vol.
BTC leads cross-asset: when BTC wins, ETH follows 60% of the time. Watch BTC first.
R:R 1.0-1.5 = 57% WR. Tighter TPs outperform wide ones. Keep TP1 close.
HYPE in extreme vol = 33% WR. Never trade HYPE during volatility spikes.
1h timeframe predicts 4h with 67% accuracy (73% for BB). Use 1h as leading signal.
MFE peaks at 8-12h holding. 34% of peak move captured at 12h. Optimal hold window.
BB losers recover 56% of loss, non-BB only 45%. BB signals have better loss recovery.
